LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT STEVE JOYNER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 18, 2012 TO GIVE THE PLAINTIFF AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM JULY 11, 2012 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO OTHER APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT STEVE JOYNER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS AS REQUIRED BY SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING IN ADVANCE OF THE PREVIOUSLY SCHEDULED HEARING OF JULY 10, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Set For Trial On Jan-07-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Steve C. Joyner, Tel. 415.359.5553, defendant and moving party appearing on his own behalf.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STEVE JOYNER's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is Granted. Plaintiff failed to provide courtesy copies of the opposition papers as required by San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and the court's tentative ruling in advance of the previously scheduled hearing of July 10, 2012. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Text Ruling

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-10-2012 Continued To Jul-18-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT STEVE JOYNER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT is Continued to July 18, 2012 to give the plaintiff an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition papers to department 302 no later than 4pm July 11, 2012 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, or the motion will be granted. The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)
